# Ciminos Home Enhancements

> General Contractor serving Clifton, Park and surrounding areas. Ciminos Home Enhancements provides quality contractor services in Clifton, Park. Licensed, insured, and locally trusted.

## Key Facts
- Business: Ciminos Home Enhancements
- Category: General Contractor
- Location: Serving Clifton, Park, Clifton, Park
- Phone: (518) 356-3476
- Email: contact@ciminos-home-enhancements.com
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 127 reviews
- Years in business: 1
- Jobs completed: 50

## Services
- [Remodeling](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/contractor/ciminos-home-enhancements//services/remodel/): Kitchen, bathroom, and whole-home remodeling done right.
- [Additions](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/contractor/ciminos-home-enhancements//services/addition/): Home additions and extensions built to match your existing space.
- [Basement Finishing](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/contractor/ciminos-home-enhancements//services/basement/): Basement finishing, waterproofing, and conversion.
- [Deck Building](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/contractor/ciminos-home-enhancements//services/deck/): Custom deck design and construction for outdoor living.
- [Foundation](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/contractor/ciminos-home-enhancements//services/foundation/): Foundation repair, crack sealing, and new concrete pours.
- [General Contracting](https://pmb2.github.io/generated-websites/contractor/ciminos-home-enhancements//services/general/): Full-service general contracting for residential projects.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all contractor services.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your protection.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Clifton, Park and surrounding communities.
- **How quickly can you respond?** We offer same-day and 24/7 emergency service for urgent issues.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** Yes, we stand behind every job with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.
